attributes.action: Do not involve the United Kingdom in military action against Iran
attributes.additional_details: Escalation in the Middle East risks drawing the UK into another war. Past interventions caused instability and humanitarian crises. The UK should prioritise diplomacy and require a Parliamentary vote before any military action against Iran.
attributes.background: The UK Government should commit to not participating in military action against Iran, except in direct defence of the United Kingdom or its territories, and should require a full Parliamentary vote before any involvement in such a conflict.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
